title: What's next for AI in 2025 | MIT Technology Review
body: In 2025, these trends will continue to be a boon for defense-tech companies like Palantir, Anduril, and others, which are now capitalizing on classified military data to train AI models. The defense industry’s deep pockets will tempt mainstream AI companies into the fold too.

title: Link News Yandex Jepang Terbarat 2025 Terlengkap Hari Ini...
body: The Yandex Jepang Terbarat 2025 is more than just another fleeting online sensation—it is a case study in how modern society reacts to digital phenomena. It shows how quickly curiosity can evolve into obsession, and how easily information (or misinformation) can spread without control.
